title: Hotchpotch
body:
A small, mostly personal, mod with useful utilities including:

# Mini Coal & Charcoal

Coal split 8 ways, smelts 1 item only, useful for saving fuel. ![The crafting recipe for minicoal: Use a crafting grid to split coal into 8 chunks, they can then form a 3 by 3 ring in a crafting grid to turn them back into coal.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T8Cxr5Cl/images/b93b9a5272d470da82cc16c5f427eae0ca308c6e.png)

# Scythes

A sharpened hoe, right-clicking a fully grown crop will harvest a certain amount of connected fully grown crops. Wooden scythes harvest 5 connected crops, 8 for stone, 10 for copper and golden scythes, 16 for iron, 20 for diamond, and 40 for netherite scythes. ![An image showing wooden to diamond scythes on the left and the crafting recipe for scythes on the right: top row is filled with the tool material and the bottom left and centre slots are filled with sticks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T8Cxr5Cl/images/205de574a617eb5151d7783d99652728805e3055.png)

_if I can figure out how, I'll try add a gif later of it working_

# Crafting Pad

A portable crafting table, uses up durability to craft items but luckily can be enchanted with unbreaking and mending. ![The crafting recipe for the crafting pad: place a crafter block in the centre of a crafting table, place iron ingots to the left and right of the crafter and finally fill the top and bottom rows with iron nuggets to craft a crafting pad.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T8Cxr5Cl/images/e799aece32f7be084ee0402e1d7e84ecc4b8d10b.png)

# Faster leaf decay

When the `hotchpotch:fast_leaf_decay` game-rule is enabled, leaf blocks will decay more quickly.

_if I can figure out how, I'll try add a gif later of it working_

# Creeper Explosion Delay

Change `hotchpotch:creeper_explosion_delay` to configure how quickly creepers explode.

By default it is the same a vanilla's delay (30 ticks, 1.5 seconds) but can be as short (1/20th of a second) or as long as you'd like.
